name: Brian Level Studio
bio: A creator-focused studio entry used to demonstrate how an individual artist or writer-artist could anchor a title page and merch line.

name: Dauntless Stories
bio: Dauntless Stories is an independent comics publisher focused on action-oriented indie comics and graphic novels across sci-fi, fantasy, horror, and related genres.

name: Black Lantern Press
bio: A small-publisher example showing how multiple titles can roll up under one creator/publisher profile.

name: Crowbar Comics
bio: A rough-edged imprint example designed for darker, pulpier, and convention-friendly merch.

name: Tiny Meteor Books
bio: A creator collective example that demonstrates how one publisher/creator profile can support several titles.
